name: 43_Social_Network_Analysis_GCN_Cora_ML
query: Habari! Unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mfumo wa uchambuzi wa mtandao wa kijamii kwa kutumia modeli ya GCN na seti ya data ya mtandao wa nukuu wa Cora? Kwanza, hebu tuweke na kusindika seti ya data, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tumia modeli ya GCN kuainisha nodi na rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa ili kupata matokeo bora katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi modeli chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Ukishafanya hivyo, tafadhali hifadhi utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`. Onyesha muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`. Mwisho, unda grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana kwa kutumia D3.js au Bokeh ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`. Itakuwa nzuri pia ikiwa utekelezaji wako unaweza kumruhusu programu kubadilisha kwa urahisi kwenye seti nyingine za data za nukuu. Asante sana kwa msaada wako!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.
Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.
Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.
Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza nodi za kibinafsi na uainishaji wao kwa njia ya nguvu.
Uonyeshaji wa mtandao wa nukuu unapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya madarasa tofauti ya nodi na mahusiano.
Mfumo unapaswa kubuniwa kushughulikia seti za data za nukuu za ziada kwa marekebisho madogo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Cora citation network" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no use of libraries like `torch_geometric`, `dgl`, or any other mechanism to actually fetch or process the Cora dataset. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a genuine implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data preprocessing, normalization, or denoising. It is merely a placeholder/stub that:

1. Defines a list of requirement criteria as strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`)
2. Has a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` — no actual dataset is loaded
3. Has a `build_transforms()` function that returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — no real transforms are applied

There is no actual implementation of normalization (e.g., adjacency matrix normalization for GCN), denoising, or any real data preprocessing logic. The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation that does not include any actual GCN model, hyperparameters, learning rate, or hidden layer size. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range and accumulates a sum — there is no neural network, no optimizer, no learning rate configuration, and no hidden layer size tuning. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and only creates placeholder artifact files. No hyperparameter tuning of any kind is present.

<UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that `models/saved_models/` directory exists but is empty — no model files are saved there. The `train.py` file's `save_expected_artifacts()` function only creates `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt` and `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`, but does not include any code to save a model under `models/saved_models/`. Additionally, the trajectory evidence confirms there is no record of any model saving operations in that directory.

judge_stats.criteria: Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt` ipo, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` - ambayo ni thamani ya placeholder tu, si matokeo halisi ya uainishaji wa nodi. Hakuna takwimu za kweli kama vile usahihi (accuracy), F1-score, au vipimo vingine vya utendaji vinavyohusiana na mfano wa GCN kwenye dataset ya Cora ML. Kwa hivyo, hitaji halijakamilika kwa sababu matokeo ya kweli ya uainishaji hayakuhifadhiwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `citation_network_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, maudhui yake hayawezi kuthibitishwa kwa sababu ya hitilafu ya kusoma picha (`litellm.BadRequestError`). Zaidi ya hayo, trajectory haina rekodi yoyote ya vitendo vinavyohusiana na uundaji wa muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu - hakuna ushahidi wa utekelezaji wa msimbo unaotumia maktaba kama `networkx` au `matplotlib` kuunda na kuhifadhi picha hiyo. Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu uliundwa na kuhifadhiwa kwa mafanikio.

judge_stats.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code in `src/train.py` only creates a placeholder file `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png` by writing plain text (`'generated by minimal semantic train.py\n'`) to it — there is no actual image or interactive graph. Neither D3.js nor Bokeh is used anywhere in the codebase. The `data_loader.py` and `train.py` files are explicitly labeled as "minimal semantic implementation" placeholders with no real network visualization logic. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no interactive network graph was created using D3.js or Bokeh.
